---
title: "Example Rmd file using the Stata graphics hook"
output: html_document
---

```{r include=FALSE}
library(Statamarkdown)
```

```{stata, collectcode=TRUE}
sysuse auto, clear
```

```{stata scatterplot, stata.fig=TRUE, fig.cap="Mileage against weight", fig.alt="Scatter plot showing car mileage falling as weight rises"}
scatter mpg weight
```

Here is some text about the plot

## Section header

Some more text
